name: Clarum
long_description:
Clarum automates diligence, monitoring, and reporting for private market investors. Our AI agents learn how each firm works and automate their process end to end. Everything is individualized (checklists, templates, scoring models) and adapts as your process changes.

Clarum also acts as a self-updating knowledge base across every document your firm has ever seen, connecting dots no analyst could.
one_liner: AI agents for private market diligence, monitoring, and reporting
